description_long: This is a large industrial shelving unit, constructed with a robust metal frame and multiple horizontal wooden or composite shelves. The structure is divided into several bays, each containing stacks of flat, rectangular packages or boxes, likely representing stored goods or materials. The shelving is open on both the front and back, allowing easy access to the contents from either side. Several human figures are depicted interacting with the shelves, some standing on the upper levels, indicating the shelves are strong enough to support significant weight. The unit is accompanied by adjacent work tables and equipment, suggesting a warehouse or workshop environment. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing storage capacity and accessibility.
description: A large, industrial metal shelving unit with multiple open shelves, filled with stacked packages and surrounded by workers. The structure is sturdy, open on both sides, and designed for heavy-duty storage in a warehouse or workshop setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the shelving unit, with workers standing on the upper shelves and packages stacked on each level.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the arrangement of packages, with adjacent work tables and workers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view of the shelving unit, showing the open back and more workers interacting with the shelves and nearby tables.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth of the shelves and the proximity of work tables and workers.
